heading: SEPARATION OF OFFICERS FOR SUBSTANDARD PERFORMANCE OF DUTY OR FOR CERTAIN OTHER REASONS
label: 2011 SEPARATION OF OFFICERS FOR SUBSTANDARD PERFORMANCE OF DUTY OR FOR CERTAIN OTHER REASONS

children.heading: Authority to establish procedures to consider the separation of officers for substandard performance of duty and for certain other reasons
Removal of officer: action by Secretary upon recommendation of retention board
Officer considered for removal: voluntary retirement or discharge
Officers eligible to serve on retention boards
